race.comment: CUESTA (11) returned from a 21-week spell last start and added to her long list of minor placings when edged out over this distance at Kembla. Drawn to enjoy a lovely run so although she is very good at finding one better this looks an ideal second-up assignment. The Perry stable gave up on middle distance tests for TOTOKA (10) last start and reverted to a 1200m BM64 with immediate results, her comfortable win at this circuit ending a win drought. No penalty for that victory as she takes on the boys this time. In the mix once again. DIVINE VICKY (4) flew but just missed two back at Hawkesbury then wasn't quite up to the task in town more recently. At her best over today's trip and she looks a threat back at the provincials. WRITTEN SCANDAL (6) turned in an eye-catcher when resuming over 1100m at Rosehill three weeks ago. Nicely placed this time in much softer company. PRINZERRO (9) hasn't been far away at his last three runs. Very fit and not out of contention.
